panels.alt: Five restored landmark lights forming a calm answer around Noctyra at the Island Heart
panels.caption: Five lights answer one warning.

panels.alt: Miri deliberately uncovering her family lantern while the Lumin watch
panels.caption: Miri: “We can be careful without disappearing.”
The crystal breaks. The warning remains—but it no longer owns the sky.

panels.alt: Noctyra lowering her wings and listening to the people of Luma Isle
panels.caption: Noctyra: “I was trying to keep the small lights safe.”

panels.alt: The Hatchery opening to the stars as the waiting egg glows softly
panels.caption: For the first time since the Drift, the Hatchery sees the stars.

panels.alt: Elder Sava studying an unfamiliar deliberately marked fragment of dark crystal
panels.caption: Sava: “This mark is not Lumin craft. Someone shaped the interruption.”

panels.alt: A restored golden route leaving Luma Isle as a distant island answers in pale light
panels.caption: One route opens. Another answers.

panels.alt: Miri, Poko, Sava, Ivo, and Noctyra looking together toward the next answering route
panels.caption: Miri: “We will keep the light open.”
